text:
Vrijen Attawar: I spoke to Ben about the partnerships, went through the partnerships document, highlighted a couple of companies.
Vrijen Attawar: Broadly speaking, the hypothesis is the same, you know, that anything that helps people make money directly and indirectly is worth at least checking out.
Vrijen Attawar: We discussed further and sort of concluded that maybe having like a marquee sort of like signing, like a big name sort of data, like where can we punch above our weight, essentially, and get like a big name deal.
Vrijen Attawar: Ben seems to think gamma, there's potential there.
Vrijen Attawar: You guys apparently already have some inroads there.
Vrijen Attawar: The product kind of visualizes nicely, and I don't think anyone's trying to use the gamma API right now, right?
Vrijen Attawar: That's a pretty counterintuitive sort of way to go about it.
Vrijen Attawar: So I do think we have like a brief moment in time where we could try to snap up a couple of those.
Vrijen Attawar: So gamma aside, I'll try a few.
Vrijen Attawar: But yeah, I'll pause there, see if there's anything else.
Tiffany Huang: No, this looks really good.
Tiffany Huang: think Clay is a really good idea, actually.
Vrijen Attawar: I know someone that's a really high up GTM engineer, Clay, but she's also crazy busy.
Vrijen Attawar: Let me try to ping her.
Vrijen Attawar: She's an ex-founder.
Vrijen Attawar: So I can try to, as long as, like, sometimes people get guilty about not responding to you, and then they don't respond to you even harder.
Vrijen Attawar: So I'm hoping that's not what's happening.
Vrijen Attawar: But yeah, I think I should be okay with her.
Vrijen Attawar: I'll send her some stuff and get her excited about Zoe.
Vrijen Attawar: But do you guys have an in-with Clay?
Tiffany Huang: I'm asking my friend right now.
Vrijen Attawar: Ben has the founder on LinkedIn, I'm pretty sure.
Vrijen Attawar: Ben does?
Tiffany Huang: Ben does.
Vrijen Attawar: Yeah, I'm pretty sure he's Zachary Ahmad, I think is his name.
Vrijen Attawar: And Ben, I think he showed up in Ben's LinkedIn content.
Vrijen Attawar: So worth noting, Clay would be  the best.
Vrijen Attawar: Like, they would actually...
Vrijen Attawar: Ashley would best.
Vrijen Attawar: So Clay would be, Clay would be dope.
Vrijen Attawar: I'll see if Ashley is down to chat.
Vrijen Attawar: Ooh, I can try to hit her with the I'm selling my company.
Vrijen Attawar: She'll respond to that.
Vrijen Attawar: So there's that.
Vrijen Attawar: Other big good news.
Vrijen Attawar: David super came through.
Vrijen Attawar: He has gotten Ben Ares' attention.
Vrijen Attawar: E-R-S-Z.
Vrijen Attawar: Ben Ares is a really big PM influencer.
Vrijen Attawar: Yeah, he's got a podcast.
Vrijen Attawar: He wants to come by the ZO office.
Tiffany Huang: He's like super stoked by the product.
Vrijen Attawar: Yeah, yeah, So David was like, try to show up that day.
Vrijen Attawar: Like, it'll be good to have a, like a user around.
Vrijen Attawar: They can basically like, Rob can basically just chat with them and give them the tour.
Vrijen Attawar: don't need to meddle with that.
Vrijen Attawar: But essentially, he was like, yeah, give him the treat, like, give him a little tour, show him the product and, like, the team, and he'll be, like, very supportive.
Vrijen Attawar: And he's part of two huge PM.
Vrijen Attawar: communities that are like paid, opt-in, really high agency ones.
Vrijen Attawar: So his thing will go a long way.
Vrijen Attawar: So that's the second one.
Vrijen Attawar: Then FOHE, Future of Higher Education Group, wants to do a hackathon.
Vrijen Attawar: I'm most likely going to be the FOHE co-lead for New York, which is pretty awesome.
Vrijen Attawar: Let me actually respond to their message.
Vrijen Attawar: what lead?
Vrijen Attawar: The Future of Higher Education Group co-lead for New York.
Vrijen Attawar: So New York has like 300, 400 folks, and FOHE in total has about 5,000.
Vrijen Attawar: So it's a really, really good org.
Vrijen Attawar: It's like, like I said, if you're trying to, let's do the hackathon.
Vrijen Attawar: And if we make the FOHE folks happy, basically any ed tech company in the country, you'll be able to get ties with.
Vrijen Attawar: Like the FOHE folks are crazy networked within ed tech specifically.
Vrijen Attawar: So yeah, for what that's.
Vrijen Attawar: That would be a good in, but they'll certainly be a very good crowd to hackathon with because they'll all be making like very good for humanity products.
Vrijen Attawar: In fact, if that is a theme that you're down with, like the social good theme, I know another startup that is specifically trying to like advertise nonprofits and would even bring nonprofits that could like code with Zoe and stuff.
Vrijen Attawar: So that's another potential angle on the hackathon side.
Vrijen Attawar: And the third is always is major league hacking.
Vrijen Attawar: But I think if we did a hackathon before we approached them, that would be ideal.

Vrijen Attawar: And I might even get like, I'll see if I can get through the clay person first and then  with their API because it's a little expensive.
Vrijen Attawar: But yeah, I'll start basically the thinking is, if there's something I can demo really quickly that Ben can then drop a message saying, hey, my users are building cool  with your product.
Vrijen Attawar: Like, you know, we should talk.
Vrijen Attawar: I feel like that's a pretty strong, you know, line of, line of query.

Vrijen Attawar: I'm thinking that can be like a repeatable motion where we like basically pump out a demo and then get Ben to like slide.

Tiffany Huang: Okay, yeah, that sounds good.
Tiffany Huang: Yeah, I'm sure Jamie would be happy to edit.
Tiffany Huang: Do you need me to, do you need us to create anything, like code anything?
Tiffany Huang: No, no, no, it should be fine.
Vrijen Attawar: I should, I have some one-pagers that I want to run through Gamma's API, so I'll just like tinker with it and then get you guys a demo by tomorrow.
Vrijen Attawar: Um, and then in the meantime, yeah, in the meantime, I'll just let you know if anyone comes through, um, I have a call with recall AI later this week with parse, with tweets, basically with like four different people.
Vrijen Attawar: So I'll let you know how that goes and what comes out of it.
Vrijen Attawar: Um, but like, basically two small fish and one medium sized fish.
Vrijen Attawar: Nice.
Vrijen Attawar: Okay, let's go then.
Tiffany Huang: Sweet.
Tiffany Huang: Cool.
Tiffany Huang: That's pretty much it for me.
Tiffany Huang: Okay, I'll keep thinking if there are any others, and I have an end to Clay that my friend just gave me, so I'm gonna try to get connected to somebody else who knows somebody.
Tiffany Huang: Hell yeah.
Tiffany Huang: Yeah, hell yeah.
Vrijen Attawar: Okay, cool.
Vrijen Attawar: Let me know.
Vrijen Attawar: And if you need me to like pump out a demo or do any UGC, just ping.

Tiffany Huang: Cool.
Tiffany Huang: No problem.
Tiffany Huang: Ciao.
